name: Simple Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flours together.
2. Cream the butter and sugar thoroughly.
3. Work in the flours until combined.
4. Knead until smooth, without cracks.
5. Shape into a round on a baking sheet or press into a flat tin.
6. Prick with a fork all around the edges.
7. Bake in a slow oven (325F / 160C / gas mark 3) for about 45 minutes.
8. Allow to cool slightly, then cut into wedges or fingers.
9. Sprinkle with caster sugar before serving.
